target_actions.rationale: Ordinary PM role-work already owns requested reading, research and evidence collection.
The fields do not own unique mechanics and incorrectly make material work mandatory.
Risk-appropriate ordinary work review provides the same independent quality boundary.
The family remains the single current capability-discovery path and preserves family parity.
The index is useful when present but cannot own acceptance or stage progression.

claim_boundary: The model proves the declared finite discovery/resource states only; it does not prove that every future skill or source is semantically useful.

failures: mandatory dedicated material gate re-entered the current path

dedicated_material_result.expected: dedicated material result family became current authority
failures: dedicated material result family became current authority

map_absence_blocks.expected: optional material artifact-map absence blocked the flow
failures: optional material artifact-map absence blocked the flow

failures: selected skill deep read produced no reviewer-checkable obligations
